# CanonicalResourceIdentifier.IsLoopbackHost method

Returns `true` when *host* denotes loopback / local development, for which the `http` scheme is permitted on a canonical resource identifier (R-23.1-n).

```csharp
public static bool IsLoopbackHost(string host)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| host | The host component to test. |

## Return Value

`true` for `localhost`, `127.0.0.1`, or the IPv6 loopback.
